issue_summary: Add BinarySortField: index sorting on BinaryDocValues

      throws IOException;
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Get an array of {@link ComparableProvider}, one per segment, for merge sorting documents in
   * different segments
   *

   */
javadoc_after:
/** * Get an array of {@link ComparableProvider}, one per segment, for merge sorting documents in * different segments. * *

Implementations whose sort value is a {@code long} should implement this method; it is * exposed to the merger through the default {@link #getComparableValues(List)}. Implementations * that override {@link #getComparableValues(List)} directly need not implement this method. * * @param readers the readers to be merged */
